body.title: Add config/profiles/cc.yaml — CC agent profile
body.result: config/profiles/cc.yaml shipped: stateless CC profile (inference+browser_use+swadl, no postgres/discord, narrow inbound ACL, mcp surface). Test coverage in test_announce_round_trip.py. agent_datacenter commit afecb97.
body.description:
CC profile YAML. Per § 4.3 of design: CC has inference + filesystem-read access, joins shared + igor-cc channels, no state_refs (CC is stateless across sessions), inbound from skeleton + igor only, outbound to *. Slice 3 prereq for the CC-side announce_mcp.py adapter — filing now so it's ready when slice 3 starts. Not on critical path of slice 2 green test.

**Affected files:** /home/akien/dev/src/agent_datacenter/config/profiles/cc.yaml (NEW)
**Design rules:** matches igor.yaml shape (profile_version, agent_type, allowed_devices, device_permissions, default_channels, state_refs, acl, surfaces); inherits: [] (v1, no inheritance); design § 4.3.
**Scope boundary:** in — single YAML file matching the Igor profile shape. Out — inheritance processing (slice 5), CC-side adapter code (slice 3 ticket).
**Test plan:** Extend test_announce_round_trip.py with a cc fixture (or new tests/test_cc_profile.py) that loads cc.yaml, validates required fields, asserts allowed_devices includes 'inference', default_channels includes 'shared' and 'igor-cc', state_refs is empty dict.
